pages.image_tooltip: A highly active ancient crocodilian, Kaprosuchus has gnarly, tusk-like teeth crowding its maw and a nasty temper. Its unusual, powerful legs are built to propel it directly into view, with its jaws clamped firmly around your head.

pages.feature_1.tooltip: Kaprosuchus can be tamed using §aBones§7; tamed Kaprosuchus can be commanded to attack
pages.feature_1.title: Swamp Puppy
pages.feature_2.tooltip: Kaprosuchus is capable of bombastic leaps that carry them far and high in the air, escape is no easy task
pages.feature_2.title: Kinetic Crocodile
